projects.title: Project 1: My Smart Village scrapbook
projects.description: Children observe home devices, farming tools, mobile use, and simple patterns in nature. They interview elders about how life changed.

projects.title: Project 2: Nature Pattern Detective
projects.description: They collect leaves, seeds, stones, or flowers and group them by type, colour, size, or pattern. This becomes their first data-collection experience.

projects.title: Project 3: Family Technology Timeline
projects.description: Children document how technology has changed in their family over generations.

projects.title: Project 4: Safe Internet Pledge
projects.description: Create a poster with internet safety rules.

projects.title: Project 5: My AI in Daily Life page
projects.description: A picture page on 'My view of AI' with borders, colours, and a title page.

content.materials: No computer required. Optional phone camera or notes app only if available. Everything must work with notebook and pencil alone.
content.submission: Bring back a compiled holiday notebook with: 1) 5 AI examples, 2) 10 safety rules, 3) one nature-pattern page, 4) one elder interview, 5) one page on computer care.

grading.belowAverage: Completes at least 2–3 simple pages with drawings and short lines.
grading.bright: Adds extra pages, comparisons, and neat presentation.

content.note: Use holidays to build curiosity, not pressure. 📧 You can email me anytime at venkatavishnu.skksv@gmail.com or message me on Instagram @comaecod. I will surely reply!
